summary: DiskWise now works like a storage consultant — find what's eating your disk space, get a prioritized cleanup plan, and reclaim space safely.
introduced: Three-phase workflow: identify disk usage, analyze findings, then take action
Action buckets that label items safe to clean, worth reviewing first, or personal to keep
Fourteen focused Maintenance tools — from App Caches and node_modules to APFS Snapshot thinning
Duplicate finder moved to its own tab — run it when you want, not on every scan
Option to rebuild your storage index after a major scan-model upgrade
